Atlantic Metals Xchange
Sponsored
Have you ever wondered what your jewelry is worth? 
If you answered Yes, stop and watch this video now, 
while Gold is near record highs!

Hi, my name is Matt from Atlantic Metals Xchange here in Charlotte, NC. 

As one of the area's largest suppliers of Gold & Silver bullion, we've built a reputation for our honest and transparent approach to business. Going even a step further we are the only local dealer to post our live buy and sell prices directly on our website.

But there's more to us than just bullion.

We're passionate about helping people understand the true value of their Gold and Silver jewelry, Watches, Diamonds, Bullion, rare coins, Antique and vintage estate pieces. Whether you're looking to sell or know someone who is curious about the worth of their items, our experienced team provides detailed, and accurate appraisals.

When I say accurate appraisals, what do I mean? This is the part your average jewelry store owner doesn’t want you to know. Our appraisal is an offer to buy, on the spot. Not an inflated, “imaginary retail number” It's a real offer based on today's metals rates, wholesale prices of diamonds and recent sales comps.

Because we believe in educating our customers, not just transacting with them. That's why we take the time to explain our evaluation process, ensuring you're fully informed every step of the way.

Don't just take our word for it – hear from hundreds of satisfied real customer reviews on google.

If you're in Charlotte or the Carolinas and looking to sell your jewelry, bullion, coins, Diamonds, Watches or precious metals, or looking to buy gold or silver bullion, click the link below and visit us at Atlantic Metals Xchange In Ballantyne.
 
We're not just a store
We're your trusted partner in valuing and selling precious items.
